Lakers Lead Rockets 2-0 Entering Game 3 | NO to HOU series win (pending Game 3 on Apr 24) | MED confidence** [2][4]

Lakers hold a 2-0 series lead over Houston, with Game 3 set for Apr 24 (HOU -9.5 spread); LeBron James injury concerns and Kevin Durant's potential return add uncertainty, but analysts note Houston's statistical edge if Durant sits[4]. Markets may adjust post-Durant status confirmat

signals.raw:
Eastern Conference Semifinals Set: Pacers Advance After 119-118 Win Over Bucks | YES to IND series progression | HIGH confidence** [2]

Indiana beat Milwaukee 119-118, advancing past Knicks (3-1 implied) to face Cavaliers winner vs. Heat[2]. Confirms Pacers' momentum, impacting semifinal odds. No rookie-specific announcements in results.
